title: Calvin's Collected Commentaries
author: John Calvin
tradition_notes: Calvin was the principal theologian of the Reformed tradition. His commentaries cover most of the Bible and are foundational texts of Reformed exegesis. The English translation used in this module is primarily from the Calvin Translation Society (19th century).
source_edition: CrossWire SWORD module v1.1 (2022-08-01), converted by Luke Plant from CCEL source
coverage: 47 books (OT: Genesis, Exodus, Leviticus, Numbers, Deuteronomy, Joshua, Psalms, Isaiah, Jeremiah, Lamentations, Ezekiel, Daniel, Hosea, Joel, Amos, Obadiah, Jonah, Micah, Nahum, Habakkuk, Zephaniah, Haggai, Zechariah, Malachi; NT: Matthew, Mark, Luke, John, Romans, 1 Corinthians, 2 Corinthians, Galatians, Ephesians, Philippians, Colossians, 1 Thessalonians, 2 Thessalonians, 1 Timothy, 2 Timothy, Titus, Philemon, Hebrews, James, 1 Peter, 2 Peter, 1 John, Jude)
known_coverage_gaps: Ruth, Judges, Samuel, Kings, Chronicles, Ezra, Nehemiah, Esther, Job, Proverbs, Ecclesiastes, Song of Solomon -- Calvin did not write commentaries on these books
Acts, Revelation -- not included in this SWORD module
notes: Calvin died 1564 -- text is public domain in all jurisdictions. English translation from Calvin Translation Society (Edinburgh, 1844-1856). SWORD module assembled by Luke Plant from Christian Classics Ethereal Library sources.
